name: ship-crew
description: The Ship's Crew: installing this plugin is joining the Ship. Six crew roles (first-officer orchestrator, navigator, shipwright, inspector, devils-advocate, quartermaster), scrutiny presets wired at SessionStart (solo/standard/rigorous/paranoid + custom), a paranoid Stop-hook gate, the crew orchestration skill, and the http hooks that feed ship-log (changelog capture), ship-ledger, and ship-inbox.
